Hunt-Isaak](images/annasmall.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Anna Rose Hunt-Isaak"}](#annarose) ::: ### Collaborators ::: {#members layout-ncol="5"} [![Prof. Chris Pack, McGill](images/pack_christopher.png){fig-alt="Photo of Chris"}](https://www.mcgill.ca/neuro/christopher-pack-phd) [![Dr. Ifedayo-Emmanuel Adeyefa-Olasupo, Janelia Farms](images/EL3_1.png){fig-alt="Photo of Emmanuel"}](https://www.janelia.org/people/ifedayo-emmanuel-adeyefa-olasupo) [![Prof. Catherine Guastavino, McGill](images/CG.jpeg){fig-alt="Photo of Catherine"}](https://www.mcgill.ca/sis/people/faculty/guastavino) [![Prof. Fabrice Marandola, CIRMMT, McGill](images/fm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Fabrice"}](https://www.mcgill.ca/music/fabrice-marandola) [![Prof. Simone Dalla Bella, co-Director, BRAMS, UdeM](images/SDB.png){fig-alt="Photo of Simone"}](https://brams.org/members/simone-dalla-bella/) [![Prof. Audrey Durand, U.Laval](images/Audreysm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Audrey"}](https://audur2.ift.ulaval.ca/) [![Prof. Dang Nguyen, Neurology, CHUM](images/dang.png){fig-alt="Photo of Dang Nguyen"}](https://neurosciences.umontreal.ca/recherche/les-chercheurs/dang-khoa-nguyen/) [![Pauline Patie](images/paulinesm.png){fig-alt="Photo de Pauline"}](https://www.pauline-patie.com/) [![Prof. Marie-Hélène Boudrias, McGill](images/mh.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of MH"}](https://www.mcgill.ca/spot/marie-helene-boudrias) [![Joshua Rosner, McGill](images/joshuasm.png){fig-alt="Photo de Joshua"}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/joshua-rosner-98b15b166/?originalSubdomain=ca) ::: ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Suresh Krishna ::: column-margin ![](images/sureshsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Suresh Krishna" width="200"} ::: - Associate Professor, Department of Physiology, McGill. - MBBS (Med School), AIIMS, New Delhi; PhD, NYU, New York. - Spent time at Columbia University, CNRS (Lyon), German Primate Center (Goettingen), MPI for Human Development (Berlin), before coming to McGill (Jan 2020). - [Email](mailto:suresh.krishna@mcgill.ca); [Google Scholar]( Google Scholar - https://tinyurl.com/ypeu5ha3) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Katarzyna (Kasia) Jurewicz ::: column-margin ![](images/kasia.png){fig-alt="Photo of Katarzyna (Kasia) Jurewicz" width="200"} ::: - Post-doctoral fellow, Department of Physiology, McGill. - MSc in Psychology, University of Warsaw; PhD in Neurobiology, Nencki Institute of Experimental Biology, Polish Academy of Sciences, Warsaw. - Previously, I was a post-doc in Dr. Becket Ebitz' lab (Noise lab) at Université de Montréal. Earlier, I conducted research in Dr. Ewa Kublik's Cortico-Thalamic Group at the Nencki Institute of Experimental Biology. My PhD work was supervised by Prof. Andrzej Wróbel in the Laboratory of the Visual System at Nencki. - [Email](mailto:katarzyna.jurewicz@mail.mcgill.ca); [Google Scholar]( http://www.tinyurl.com/kjurewicz-scholar) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Yohai-Eliel Berreby ::: column-margin ![](images/yohaism2.png){fig-alt="Photo of Yohai-Eliel Berreby" width="200"} ::: - Ph.D. student, Department of Physiology, McGill - Diplôme d'Ingénieur (combined B.Sc. and M.Sc. in Engineering), Télécom Paris, Palaiseau, France - MPSI/MP CPGE (Math/Physics [*Classes Préparatoires aux Grandes Écoles*](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Classe_pr%C3%A9paratoire_aux_grandes_%C3%A9coles)), Lycée Hoche, Versailles, France - [Email](mailto:yohai-eliel.berreby@mail.mcgill.ca); [GitHub]( https://github.com/yberreby/); [LinkedIn]( https://linkedin.com/in/yberreby) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Amanda Pruss ::: column-margin ![](images/marty2.png){fig-alt="Photo of Amanda Pruss" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Integrated Program in Neuroscience, McGill. - B.A. in Psychology, McGill. - I am also very interested in applying my knowledge in neuroscience in a clinical setting as well, in an effort to help people with conditions related to vision, attention, or epilepsy. - [Email](mailto:amanda.pruss@mail.mcgill.ca); [GitHub]( https://github.com/amandapruss); [LinkedIn]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/amanda-pruss-a78813261/) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Oren Gurevitch ::: column-margin ![](images/orensm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Oren Gurevitch" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. - B.Sc. in Neuroscience, Bar-Ilan University, Ramat Gan, Israel. - Previously, I was a research assistant working on sensory processing using rats, at Bar-Ilan University under Professor Adam Zaidel. Before that, as a lab assistant at the Weizmann Institute of Science, I worked on Multiple Sclerosis research with Professor Idit Shachar. - [Email](mailto:oren.gurevitch@mail.mcgill.ca); [GitHub]( https://github.com/OrenGurevitch); [LinkedIn]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/oren-gurevitch/) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Buxin Liao ::: column-margin ![](images/buxinsm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Buxin Liao" width="200"} ::: - Ph.D. Student, Integrated Program in Neuroscience, McGill. - M.Eng. Student, Biomedical Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Chengdu, China. - B.Eng. in Biomedical Engineering, Southeast University, Nanjing, China. - [Email](mailto:buxin.liao@mail.mcgill.ca); [GitHub]( https://github.com/D-Fonauton) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Noa Kemp ::: column-margin ![](images/noasm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Noa Kemp" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. - B.Sc. in Biology and Computer Science, McGill. - Between musical theater, computer science and the brain - I wasn’t able to chose so I will focus on one of their intersections: the study of audiovisual space and object perception. - I was born and raised in Belgium. However half of my family lives in Israel and I have spent most of my summers there. Today, the place I truly call home is definitely Montreal. - [Email](mailto:noa.kemp@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Xinning Le ::: column-margin ![](images/xinning.png){fig-alt="Photo of Xinning Le" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Integrated Program in Neuroscience, McGill. - M.Eng. Student, Biomedical Engineering, University of Electronic Science and Technology of China, Chengdu, China. - B.Sc. in Information Security, Xi'an University of Posts and Telecommunication, Xian, China. - [Email](mailto:xinning.le@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Jacky Chen ::: column-margin ![](images/jackysm.png){fig-alt="Photo of Jacky Chen" width="200"} ::: - B.A. in Psychology with double minors in Behavioral Science and Science for Art Students, McGill - As someone who enjoys playing the piano, I am curious to explore the ways cognitive processes impact musical expression and attentional shifts. My research interests lie at the intersection of psychology, music, and cognitive science. - I was born in Shanghai, China, where I spent the first 18 years of my life. After completing high school, I relocated to Montreal to pursue my studies at McGill University. I really enjoy the lovely summer in Montreal! - [Email](mailto:yijun.chen@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Alex Zhao ::: column-margin ![](images/alexsm.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Alex Zhao" width="200"} ::: - B. Sc student, Neuroscience program, McGill - My research interests lie in computational neuroscience, as I believe that computational models have the power to capture the brain's inner workings. In my free time I enjoy reading and solo traveling. - [Email](mailto:alex.zhao@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Evan Jiang ::: column-margin ![](images/ejiang.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Evan Jiang" width="200"} ::: - B. Sc student, Major Computer Science and Biology, Mcgill - I initially started in the life science program but developed a strong interest in programming, which led me to combine these interests by switching to a major in computer science and biology. My research interests now lie in computational biology, with a particular focus on neurology. - [Email](mailto:duoduo.jiang@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Isidore Victorri ::: column-margin ![](images/Isidore.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Isidore Victorri" width="200"} ::: - B.Sc. Student in Physiology and Physics, McGill. - With a bachelor’s program focused on research, I'm eager to dive into the field of auditory attention. - Originally from Saint-Pierre-et-Miquelon, a small French overseas territory, now experiencing life in a big city for the first time while studying in Montréal. - [Email](mailto:isidore.victorri@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Maya Aderka ::: column-margin ![](images/maya.jpeg){fig-alt="Photo of Maya Aderka" width="200"} ::: - M.Sc. Student, Department of Physiology, McGill. - B.Sc. in Psychology and Computer Science with an emphasis on Neuroscience, Tel Aviv University, Tel Aviv, Israel. - During mt B.Sc, I worked as a research assistant in Prof. Nitzan Censor lab, which studies memory and learning. I assisted in conducting behavioral studies, as well as studies involving EEG, fMRI and TMS. - In the final year of my B.Sc, I joined Prof. Yuval Nir's sleep lab to help with an initiative to create SleepEEGpy, a platform to pre-process and analyse sleep EEG data. - [Email](mailto:maya.aderka@mail.mcgill.ca); [GitHub]( https://github.com/maya-a); [LinkedIn]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/maya-aderka-703b08229/) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Sabrina Du ::: column-margin ![](images/SabrinaDu_Picture.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Sabrina Du" width="200"} ::: - B. Sc. Student, Honours Neuroscience, McGill. - Born and raised in Montreal, I grew up alongside this city’s rise as an AI hub and developed a keen interest in brain-inspired computational architectures. - How does short-term perceptual memory guide decisions? Can we replicate this memory system in artificial networks? These questions (and more) are ones I am excited to explore. - In my free time, you can find me listening to a podcast, hiking, or attempting to sew. - [Email](mailto:sabrina.du@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Taimaa Bachi ::: column-margin ![](images/taimaa.jpeg){fig-alt="Photo of Taimaa Bachi" width="200"} ::: - B. Eng Student, Software Engineering, McGill. - I initially majored in biochemistry, transitioned to psychology, then computer science, before finally deciding on software engineering. My passion for the brain led me to minor in neuroscience, and I am excited to explore the possibilities of NeuroAI. - [Email](mailto:taimaa.orabikassabbachi@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ #### Anna Rose Hunt-Isaak ::: column-margin ![](images/annasmall.jpg){fig-alt="Photo of Anna Rose Hunt-Isaak" width="200"} ::: - BASc Honors Cognitive Science, McGill - I’m interested in exploring the intersection of neuroscience and computer science, especially with regards to how we can computationally model cognitive processing and develop a better understanding of how neural activity mediates observable behaviors. - My hobbies include baking, reading George Saunders, and layering poorly for winter runs - [Email](mailto:anna.hunt-isaak@mail.mcgill.ca) ------------------------------------------------------------------------ ### Where we are from Current / Past ::: {.cell} ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](members_files/figure-html/unnamed-chunk-1-1.png){width=672} ::: ::: ### Alumni * Masters + Haoxiang Liu (2024), IPN + Buxin Liao (2024), IPN * PHGY 396 - Sean Solomon, Sarah Beydoun, Pegah Aghili * COMP 401 - Nevine Nzabonimpa * COGS 444 - Injy Fouda * PSYC 385/395 - Anais Rubsamen, Alex Parent * PSYC 494 - Youzhi Huang * NSCI 410 - Alexandru Tecu, Lilia Fernane * Mackey-Glass research bursary - Tim Yang * Undergraduate observers - Caden Welch, Max Tweedale, Elisa Niunin, Yavuz Shahzad, Divi Maheshwari, Lilie Jeanneaux, Yagya Joshi, Bradley Austin-Keiller, Lian Mouwes * Google Summer of Code interns - Dinesh Sathiaraj, Ioannis Valasakis, Prakanshul Saxena, Abhinav Venkatadri, Somnath Sharma, Jyothi Swaroop Reddy Bommareddy, Soham Mulye, Louis Martinez, Armaan Alam, Dinakar Chennupati, Dhruvanshu Joshi -------------------------------------------------- ### Us ::: {#photos layout-ncol="2"} ![Food, Fun](images/p2.png){fig-alt="lab1"} ![& French cricket in Quebec](images/p1.png){fig-alt="lab2"} ![Thompson House](images/lp3.png){fig-alt="lab2"} ![Le Mountain](images/labphoto1.png){fig-alt="lab2"} !["Point d'eau"](images/3brass.png){fig-alt="labgath"} ![Harry Potter](images/lp2sm.png){fig-alt="labgath"} :::
